scope: single-shell enumerated readings; M-quadrature controlled error; two-shell + dI follow-up

claims.name: no_condensate_fast
claims.detail: (every reading's global dF minimum is at A=0: no enumerated reading beats Reading-H, fast)

claims.name: no_condensate_hires
claims.detail: (no condensate revealed by the N_PT=20000 refinement either: the verdict is not a fast-quadrature artefact)

claims.name: curvature_positive_controlled_error
claims.detail: (min over readings of [kappa - envelope] = 8.509489e-01 > 0: A=0 is a STRICT minimum for every reading, controlled-error w.r.t. the M-quadrature -- the binding reading is the smallest kappa)

claims.name: envelope_far_below_curvature
claims.detail: (M-quadrature envelope is < 0.1% of kappa for every reading; binding = LAM kappa=8.5097e-01, envelope=1.68e-05)

claims.name: quadratic_regime_confirmed
claims.detail: (kappa(h) vs kappa(h/2) agree to <2% for every reading: the finite difference is the true dF''(0), not A^4 contamination)
